This business description is tailored for Google My Business and is designed for first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, Florida. It highlights the company's focus on providing expert real estate services to homeowners and business owners, with a strong emphasis on building long-term relationships. The description is generic and does not include any personally identifiable information (PII). 

**Revised Business Description:**

At Paul Giles & The Vintage Team at Compass, we specialize in providing expert real estate services to homeowners and business owners throughout central Florida. Established in 2002, our team of real estate professionals is dedicated to helping clients navigate the real estate market with confidence and expertise. We serve a wide range of locations, including Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, Lake Nona Region, and Lancaster Park. Our goal is to offer trusted guidance in all aspects of real estate and financing, ensuring that clients can make informed decisions and maintain strong, lasting relationships throughout their real estate journey.
